article_title: Liquor Primary licences for outdoor event venues

briefs.title: Outdoor event venues can now apply for a permanent liquor licence instead of repeated event permits
briefs.summary: BC's Liquor and Cannabis Regulation Branch now lets outdoor event venues apply for a permanent Liquor Primary licence, replacing the need to file multiple Special Event Permits (temporary one-off liquor approvals) each year.
briefs.action_required: Apply for a permanent Liquor Primary licence via the BC liquor and cannabis licensing portal.
briefs.article_title: Liquor Primary licences for outdoor event venues
